selectedOwner: HGI-308 Claude-review decision, HGI-304 retired record, and HGI-306 automation-admission owner
decision: Reject restoration; HGI-304 applies HGI-308's retirement branch because comment identity, write authority, convergence, cost, and effectiveness proof are unavailable.
evidenceRequired: A separately accepted SPEC and complete authority envelope.
One-comment-per-head convergence, stopping, escalation, cost, false-positive, and accepted-outcome evidence owned by HGI-306.
limitations: Source absence does not prove historical runs or external integrations are disabled.
nonClaims: Retirement is not proof that automatic review was ineffective; it records that admission evidence is absent.
rollbackRevocation: Restoration is a new governed capability, not rollback; keep the former workflow absent until newly accepted.
